sentences.target: Je casse un œuf dans la poêle.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kas œ̃ n‿œf dɑ̃ la pwal/

translations.fr: Je casse un œuf dans la poêle.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kas œ̃ n‿œf dɑ̃ la pwal/
translations.en: I'm cracking an egg into the pan.
translations.es: Estoy cascando un huevo en la sartén.
translations.de: Ich schlage ein Ei in die Pfanne auf.
translations.it: Sto rompendo un uovo nella padella.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正把一个鸡蛋磕进平底锅里。
translations.pt: Estou quebrando um ovo na frigideira.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đập một quả trứng vào chảo.
translations.nl: Ik breek een ei in de pan.
translations.hi: मैं पैन में अंडा फोड़ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg knekker et egg i stekepannen.
translations.id: Aku memecahkan satu butir telur ke wajan.
translations.sv: Jag knäcker ett ägg i stekpannan.
translations.da: Jeg knækker et æg i stegepanden.
translations.ja: フライパンに卵を割っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal clitic pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun ‘œuf’ as an indefinite NP.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the verb ‘casse’.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun ‘poêle’.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘dans’ (locative).

sentences.target: Tu veux un œuf à la coque.
sentences.reading: /ty vø œ̃ n‿œf a la kɔk/

translations.fr: Tu veux un œuf à la coque.
translations.ipa: /ty vø œ̃ n‿œf a la kɔk/
translations.en: Do you want a soft-boiled egg?
translations.de: Willst du ein weich gekochtes Ei?
translations.pt: Você quer um ovo cozido mole?
translations.vi: Bạn có muốn trứng lòng đào không?
translations.ar: هل تريد بيضة مسلوقة نصف سلق؟
translations.hi: क्या तुम्हें नरम उबला अंडा चाहिए?
translations.nb: Vil du ha et bløtkokt egg?
translations.sv: Vill du ha ett löskokt ägg?
translations.da: Vil du have et blødkogt æg?
translations.ja: 半熟のゆで卵が欲しい？

tokens.explanation: Subject personal clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular; addresses a single interlocutor.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun ‘œuf’.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of ‘veux’.
Preposition introducing the fixed expression ‘à la coque’ (manner/style).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘coque’ within the PP.
Common noun, feminine; head of the PP ‘à la coque’ (culinary style).

sentences.target: Il reste un œuf au frigo.

translations.fr: Il reste un œuf au frigo.
translations.en: There’s one egg left in the fridge.
translations.es: Queda un huevo en la nevera.
translations.de: Im Kühlschrank ist noch ein Ei übrig.
translations.it: In frigo è rimasto un uovo.
translations.ko: 냉장고에 달걀 한 개가 남아 있어.
translations.pt: Na geladeira ainda tem um ovo.
translations.vi: Trong tủ lạnh còn một quả trứng.
translations.nl: Er is nog één ei in de koelkast.
translations.hu: A hűtőben még van egy tojás.
translations.hi: फ्रिज में एक अंडा बचा है.
translations.el: Στο ψυγείο έχει μείνει ένα αυγό.
translations.nb: Det er ett egg igjen i kjøleskapet.
translations.id: Di kulkas masih ada satu butir telur.
translations.sv: Det finns ett ägg kvar i kylen.
translations.ro: A mai rămas un ou în frigider.
translations.da: Der er ét æg tilbage i køleskabet.
translations.ja: 冷蔵庫に卵が一つ残っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal clitic pronoun, 3rd person singular; here functioning as an impersonal/expletive subject in an existential-like construction.
Intransitive verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes remaining/existence.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces ‘œuf’.
Common noun, masculine; the notional subject/content of the existential construction.
Contraction of ‘à + le’; preposition introducing a locative PP with ‘frigo’.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘au’ (location).

sentences.target: Elle achète un œuf frais au marché.
sentences.reading: /ɛl aʃɛt œ̃ n‿œf fʁɛ o maʁʃe/

translations.fr: Elle achète un œuf frais au marché.
translations.ipa: /ɛl aʃɛt œ̃ n‿œf fʁɛ o maʁʃe/
translations.en: She’s buying a fresh egg at the market.
translations.es: Está comprando un huevo fresco en el mercado.
translations.de: Sie kauft ein frisches Ei auf dem Markt.
translations.it: Sta comprando un uovo fresco al mercato.
translations.ko: 그녀는 시장에서 신선한 달걀을 사고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在市场买一个新鲜的鸡蛋。
translations.yue: 佢喺街市買一隻新鮮雞蛋。
translations.ru: Она покупает свежее яйцо на рынке.
translations.pt: Ela está comprando um ovo fresco no mercado.
translations.tr: Pazarda taze bir yumurta satın alıyor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang mua một quả trứng tươi ở chợ.
translations.ar: هي تشتري بيضة طازجة في السوق.
translations.nl: Ze koopt een vers ei op de markt.
translations.uk: Вона купує свіже яйце на ринку.
translations.hi: वह बाजार में ताज़ा अंडा खरीद रही है.
translations.pl: Ona kupuje świeże jajko na targu.
translations.el: Αγοράζει ένα φρέσκο αυγό στην αγορά.
translations.nb: Hun kjøper et ferskt egg på markedet.
translations.id: Dia sedang membeli telur segar di pasar.
translations.sv: Hon köper ett färskt ägg på marknaden.
translations.ro: Ea cumpără un ou proaspăt din piață.
translations.da: Hun køber et friskt æg på markedet.
translations.ja: 彼女は市場で新鮮な卵を買っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal clitic pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces ‘œuf’.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of ‘achète’.
Adjective, masculine singular; post-nominal modifier of ‘œuf’ indicating quality.
Contraction of ‘à + le’; preposition introducing a locative PP with ‘marché’.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘au’ (location).
